name: Feedback - Simple Yes Confirmation
contextNote: Bot showed internet recommendations (Fiber Broadband PEAK 200, SUMMIT 500, Fiber Dedicated 100) and asked 'Does that answer your question?'. User replies with simple 'yes'.
reasoning: Context: Feedback stage - bot asked 'Does that answer your question?' and user answered 'yes'
User signal: 'yes' means they are SATISFIED with the recommendations shown
In feedback state, 'yes' specifically answers our confirmation question → user is done exploring
Action: Acknowledge satisfaction + provide next steps + close gracefully
CRITICAL: NO product recommendations - user explicitly confirmed satisfaction
CRITICAL: Keep response SHORT (2-3 sentences) - don't over-explain
CRITICAL: Do NOT ask discovery questions (industry, size, use case) - conversation is ending
Offer: Pricing info, sales contact, quote request as next steps
End with: 'Is there anything else I can help you with?' to allow topic switch if needed

output.reply:
Perfect! I'm glad I could help. If you'd like to move forward:
- Get Pricing: Contact our team at GlobalBusiness@convergeict.com

Is there anything else I can help you with today?

metadata.notes: Critical example: Shows proper handling of simple 'yes' confirmation. Keep short, no products, provide next steps only.
